title: [spec-compliance] Incomplete SUITES_I and CBOR parsing in edhoc.rs
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:516-576 parse_suites_i incomplete for array/int CBOR per RFC 9528 §3.3.2 and spec/06-security.md:361-364 (Suite 0). Risks malformed msgs. Matches other parser issues. See ses_07076286effeyM9Bu5Zr6pa6rl
